positive: A highly detailed, enchanted forest scene featuring a majestic fox sitting by a glowing stream. The style is vibrant watercolor and ink wash, with bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate ferns surrounding the subject. Fantasy illustration, storybook quality, deep emerald and sapphire color palette, volumetric lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, pixelated, digital painting
